identity.descriptionZh: The Verge 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕编辑/机构、媒体内容、消费品牌、电商零售组织页面。
identity.descriptionEn: Tech editorial media. Acid-mint and ultraviolet accents, Manuka display, rave-flyer story tiles.

display.description: The Verge 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕编辑/机构、媒体内容、消费品牌、电商零售组织页面。
display.descriptionEn: Tech editorial media. Acid-mint and ultraviolet accents, Manuka display, rave-flyer story tiles.

borders.label: 边框 1 - Border 1
borders.description: There is no "light mode" on the homepage — the dark canvas is the product, and the only time the palette inverts is when a single story tile takes a mint or yellow fill. The depth is almost entirely flat: hairline 1px borders (`#ffffff`, `#3cffd0`, or `#5200ff`) do the work that shadows would do on a Material-flavored site. Every container is either `#131313` with a 1px outline, a fully saturated accent block, or a slate-gray `#2d2d2d` secondary surface.

borders.label: 边框 2 - Border 2
borders.description: Console Mint Border (`#309875`): A darker variant of the jelly mint used on card outlines and button borders where pure mint would over-saturate.

borders.label: 边框 3 - Border 3
borders.description: The Verge's 2024 redesign feels like somebody wired a Condé Nast magazine to a chiptune soundboard. The canvas is almost-black (`#131313`), the headlines are built from a brutally heavy display face (Manuka) that runs up to 107px, and the whole page is peppered with acid-mint `#3cffd0` and ultraviolet `#5200ff` that behave less like brand colors and more like hazard tape. Story tiles are not quiet gray cards — they're saturated, full-bleed color blocks (yellow, pink, orange, blue, purple) that feel like pasted-up rave flyers arranged into a timeline. The mood is "developer console meets club night meets tech tabloid": serious enough to cover a congressional hearing, loud enough to review a synthesizer.

borders.label: 边框 4 - Border 4
borders.description: The Verge's 2024 redesign feels like somebody wired a Condé Nast magazine to a chiptune soundboard. The canvas is almost-black (`#131313`), the headlines are built from a brutally heavy display face (Manuka) that runs up to 107px, and the whole page is peppered with acid-mint `#3cffd0` and ultraviolet `#5200ff` that behave less like brand colors and more like hazard tape. Story tiles are not quiet gray cards — they're saturated, full-bleed color blocks (yellow, pink, orange, blue, purple) that feel like pasted-up rave flyers arranged into a timeline. The mood is "developer console meets club night meets tech tabloid": serious enough to cover a congressional hearing, loud enough to review a synthesizer.

The canvas is almost-black (`#131313`), the headlines are built from a brutally heavy display face (Manuka) that runs up to 107px, and the whole page is peppered with acid-mint `#3cffd0` and ultraviolet `#5200ff` that behave less like brand colors and more like hazard tape. The mood is "developer console meets club night meets tech tabloid": serious enough to cover a congressional hearing, loud enough to review a synthesizer.

borders.label: 边框 6 - Border 6
borders.description: Hover: background shifts to `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)` (translucent white), text stays black, adds a 1px `#c2c2c2` ring shadow

panels.title: 第一眼识别明确
panels.body: 适合消费品牌、电商、媒体和产品展示页。

panels.title: 颜色与字体可复用
panels.body: 页面从本地 metadata 与 Design.md 提取 palette、typography 和标签，用于快速预览主题质感。

panels.title: 面向真实界面片段
panels.body: 按钮、输入、卡片和间距样例保持克制，便于比较不同主题的系统性差异。

do: 保持 #131313 暗色画布，让 mint、紫色、黄色等高饱和色只作为故事卡片和 CTA 的危险强调。
用 1px 边框和实色块建立层级，不依赖阴影或渐变。
Manuka 只用于大字号展示标题，正文与 UI 保持独立字体角色。
dont: 不要启用浅色背景；The Verge 的暗色画布就是核心产品感。
不要给卡片添加 box-shadow，也不要把 mint 或 ultraviolet 铺成背景雾面。
不要在 UI、按钮或正文里使用 Manuka，也不要让 mono 标签变成小写。
